behaviour_notes: Baseline REINFORCE. Stable but high variance due to no baseline.
Lower LR. Slower convergence, reduced variance.
Low LR + lower gamma. Weak long-term credit assignment.
High LR + zero entropy. Fast but greedy policy collapse risk.
High entropy coefficient. Strong exploration, slow exploitation.
Doubled n_steps. More complete returns, lower bias.
Very low max_grad. Prevents large policy updates.
High entropy + lower gamma. Exploratory, moderate performance.
Very long rollouts (4 episodes). Reduces variance further.
High LR + zero entropy. Likely unstable and divergent.
